testcase.name: OpenSparrow – CSV Import: Tab Structure csv_import nav button is visible after scrolling
testcase.classname: csv_import nav button is visible after scrolling

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – CSV Import: Tab Structure workspace shows the CSV Import heading
testcase.classname: workspace shows the CSV Import heading

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – CSV Import: Tab Structure renders sub-tabs: Import / Configuration / Import History
testcase.classname: renders sub-tabs: Import / Configuration / Import History

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – CSV Import: Tab Structure file input accepts only CSV
OpenSparrow – CSV Import: Tab Structure target table select has a placeholder and table options
testcase.classname: target table select has a placeholder and table options

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – CSV Import: Tab Structure create-new-table checkbox is present and unchecked by default
testcase.classname: create-new-table checkbox is present and unchecked by default

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – CSV Import: Tab Structure delimiter and encoding selects are rendered
testcase.classname: delimiter and encoding selects are rendered

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – CSV Import: Tab Structure switching to Import History sub-tab works
testcase.classname: switching to Import History sub-tab works

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – CSV Import: Upload Guard selecting a file without a target table shows a warning instead of uploading
testcase.classname: selecting a file without a target table shows a warning instead of uploading

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: expected '<div#editorForm>' to contain text 'Select a target table first', but the text was 'Admin Overviewv2.85Users5 active12Tablesin schema713Records12 tables0Files0 B2RAG Docsdocuments14Viewsconfigured3Automationsrules22:15Last Cron2026-06-14Recent Activity2026-06-29 18:07testadminLOGIN2026-06-29 18:07testINSERTcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testINSERTcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testINSERTcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testDELETEcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testUPDATEcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testUPDATEcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testINSERTcompanies2026-06-14 22:15SUCCESS5 sentvia admin2026-06-14 22:15SUCCESS0 sentvia adminSystem StatusOKPHP 8.2.30OKPostgreSQL 16.10WARNdisplay_errorsOn — disable in productionOKPending migrationsNoneDatabase size543.5 MBTable Record CountsUsers Mysql89Vw Users Mysq89Companies80Product–Contacts65Invoices62Leads60Assets60Activities59Products49Quotes40Contacts31Deals29'

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: expected '<div#editorForm>' to contain text 'Select a target table first', but the text was 'Admin Overviewv2.85Users5 active12Tablesin schema713Records12 tables0Files0 B2RAG Docsdocuments14Viewsconfigured3Automationsrules22:15Last Cron2026-06-14Recent Activity2026-06-29 18:07testadminLOGIN2026-06-29 18:07testINSERTcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testINSERTcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testINSERTcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testDELETEcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testUPDATEcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testUPDATEcompanies2026-06-29 18:07testINSERTcompanies2026-06-14 22:15SUCCESS5 sentvia admin2026-06-14 22:15SUCCESS0 sentvia adminSystem StatusOKPHP 8.2.30OKPostgreSQL 16.10WARNdisplay_errorsOn — disable in productionOKPending migrationsNoneDatabase size543.5 MBTable Record CountsUsers Mysql89Vw Users Mysq89Companies80Product–Contacts65Invoices62Leads60Assets60Activities59Products49Quotes40Contacts31Deals29' at Context.eval (webpack://opensparrow-e2e/./cypress/e2e/csv_import.cy.js:138:26) at runnable.fn (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:138359:19) at callFn (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:156978:21) at Runnable.run (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:156965:7) at <unknown> (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:162889:30) at PassThroughHandlerContext.finallyHandler (http://localhost:8080/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:4095:23)

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – CSV Import: File Upload uploading with a table selected POSTs to api_csv_import.php and succeeds
testcase.classname: uploading with a table selected POSTs to api_csv_import.php and succeeds

failure.message:
Timed out retrying after 15000ms: `cy.wait()` timed out waiting `15000ms` for the 1st request to the route: `csvUpload`. No request ever occurred.
https://on.cypress.io/wait

testcase.failure:
CypressError: Timed out retrying after 15000ms: `cy.wait()` timed out waiting `15000ms` for the 1st request to the route: `csvUpload`. No request ever occurred.
